subscriptions.headerDesc: All active, trialing or pending subscriptions. Approve or reject subscriptions pending admin approval.

invoices.headerDesc: All finalized invoices. Filter by status, period or company. Actions: mark paid, void, refund, retry or write off.

scheduledDebits.headerDesc: Scheduled SEPA debits. Debits appear here when an invoice is issued with a direct debit payment method.
scheduledDebits.emptyExplained: No companies currently use SEPA direct debit. Debits will appear here automatically.

dashboard.headerDesc: Key financial indicators, system health and real-time alerts. This dashboard shows MRR, ARR, churn rate and flags anomalies requiring action.

recovery.headerDesc: Billing system health status. Monitors failed webhooks, stuck checkout sessions and overdue confirmations.
recovery.allOk: All systems operational — no anomalies detected.
recovery.stuckCheckoutsDesc: Checkout sessions created over 1 hour ago without completion.
recovery.overdueConfirmationsDesc: Expected webhook confirmations that are overdue.
recovery.heartbeatsExplain: Heartbeats appear after billing cron tasks run for the first time (billing:renew, billing:process-dunning, etc.).
recovery.replayAllConfirm: You are about to replay {count} pending dead letter(s). This operation is idempotent and safe. Continue?

advanced.title: Advanced Billing
advanced.subtitle: Credit notes, payments, wallets, governance, ledger and forensics.

writeOff.title: Write Off Invoice?
writeOff.body: This will write off invoice {number} as uncollectible. This is a pure accounting operation — it does not trigger subscription changes. This action cannot be undone.

billing.sepaRequiresTrial: SEPA only at signup with trial

billing.sepaRequiresTrialHintOff: SEPA will be offered during registration for all plans, with or without a trial period.
billing.sepaRequiresTrialHintDisabled: Enable SEPA Direct Debit first to configure this option.
billing.sepaFirstFailureActionHint: Action when the first SEPA payment fails
billing.sepaDisabledHint: Enable SEPA Direct Debit first to configure this option.
billing.paymentRequiredHint: Require a valid payment method before plan upgrade.
billing.dunningWarning: Changes apply immediately to ongoing overdue invoices.

billing.failureActionHint: Action taken when all retries are exhausted.
billing.retryIntervalIncreasingError: Retry intervals must be strictly increasing.
billing.invoiceDueDaysHint: Number of days before an invoice is due. 0–365.
billing.prefixHint: Prospective only — does not affect existing documents.
billing.taxModeHint: How tax is calculated on invoices.
billing.taxV1Notice: V1: Flat global tax rate. Market/legal-status based tax not yet implemented.
billing.paymentPoliciesHint: Configure payment-related policies for all companies.
billing.addonBillingIntervalHint: Default billing interval applied when a company purchases an addon.
billing.addonDeactivationTimingHint: When disabled: immediately or at end of billing period.

contactSales.title: Premium module

benefits: Invite team members in a single click
Assign tailored roles and permissions
Track activity and compliance for every member
core.members.example: An HR manager invites 10 employees, assigns the 'Driver' role and monitors their mandatory documents in real time.
core.members.valueProposition: Save 2 hours/week on access management and compliance

core.roles.tagline: Fine-tune access control for every team member
benefits: Create custom business roles (driver, admin, accountant...)
Restrict access to sensitive data by department
Audit who has access to what at a glance
core.roles.example: The director creates a 'Branch Manager' role that can see local shipments but not global financials.

core.documents.tagline: Centralize and secure all your regulatory documents
benefits: Store permits, licenses and certifications in one place
Receive automatic alerts before expiration
Generate audit-ready compliance folders
core.documents.example: The fleet manager gets an alert 30 days before a driver's HGV license expires and triggers the renewal process.
core.documents.valueProposition: Zero forgotten expired documents — guaranteed compliance

core.billing.tagline: Manage your subscription and costs with full transparency
benefits: View your plan, add-ons and consumption at a glance
Upgrade plans or add modules self-service
Access your complete invoice history
core.billing.example: The CFO compares available plans, upgrades to Business and enables the Analytics add-on — all without calling support.
core.billing.valueProposition: Full control over 100% of your SaaS costs

benefits: Activate only the modules you actually need
Discover new features as your business grows
Control your budget by paying only for what you use
core.modules.example: A 15-person company enables shipment tracking, then adds analytics 3 months later when volume increases.
core.modules.valueProposition: A tool that scales with you — no unnecessary costs

benefits: Create workflows without coding (drag & drop)
Trigger automatic actions on events (new member, expired document...)
Reduce human error on repetitive tasks
core.workflows.example: When a driver is added, a workflow automatically sends the welcome kit, requests documents and notifies the manager.
core.workflows.valueProposition: Cut time spent on manual processes by 3x

core.settings.tagline: Configure your company workspace to fit your needs
benefits: Customize your workspace name, logo and colors
Manage notification and language preferences
Control security and authentication settings
core.settings.example: The admin sets the timezone, enables Slack notifications and applies the company branding — all in one place.
core.settings.valueProposition: A workspace tailored to your brand in under 5 minutes

core.audit.tagline: Keep a complete trail of every action in your company
benefits: View the full history of user actions
Identify who changed what and when
Export logs for compliance audits
core.audit.example: During an ISO audit, the quality manager exports the last 6 months of change logs in a single click.
core.audit.valueProposition: Total compliance and traceability — audit stress-free

logistics_shipments.tagline: Manage all your shipments from start to finish
benefits: Create and track shipments from a unified dashboard
Automatically assign drivers and vehicles
Generate delivery notes and electronic proof of delivery (ePOD)
logistics_shipments.example: The dispatcher creates 20 shipments, assigns available drivers and tracks deliveries live on the map.
logistics_shipments.valueProposition: Handle 2x more shipments with the same team

logistics_tracking.tagline: Track your deliveries and vehicles in real time
benefits: View every vehicle's position on the map
Get automatic alerts when delays occur
Share a tracking link with your customers
logistics_tracking.example: A customer receives an SMS with a tracking link and watches their package go from 'In Transit' to 'Delivered' in real time.
logistics_tracking.valueProposition: Reduce 'Where is my package?' calls by 60%

benefits: Centralize vehicle information (MOT, insurance, mileage)
Schedule preventive maintenance automatically
Analyze costs per vehicle and optimize your fleet
logistics_fleet.example: The fleet manager receives an alert that vehicle #12 is reaching 100,000 km and automatically schedules the service.

benefits: Track logistics KPIs (on-time rate, cost/km, fill rate)
Identify improvement areas with visual reports
Export data for board meetings
logistics_analytics.example: The logistics director spots a 5% drop in on-time delivery rate and identifies the responsible hub in 2 clicks.
logistics_analytics.valueProposition: Improve your service rate by 15% within 3 months

hero.title: Manage your business in one place
hero.subtitle: Documents, teams, compliance and billing — all centralized

onboarding.setupPrompt: Set up your workspace in a few minutes
onboarding.resumeHint: You haven't finished setting up your company.

landing.heroSubtitle: All your clients, team, operations, and growth — in one place. The workspace your business deserves.
landing.everythingYouNeed: Everything you need to run your business
landing.stopJuggling: Stop juggling between tools. One workspace to manage your day-to-day, your team, and your growth.
landing.manageClientsDesc: Keep all your contacts, history, and interactions organized in one place.
landing.organizeTeamDesc: Assign roles, manage access, and keep everyone aligned on what matters.
landing.trackOperationsDesc: Follow orders, shipments, and tasks from start to finish with full visibility.
landing.customizeWorkspaceDesc: Adapt the interface, branding, and features to match how you work.
landing.stayInControlDesc: Secure access, session management, and permissions — you decide who sees what.
landing.growWithConfidenceDesc: Add team members, services, and locations as your business expands.
landing.builtForRealDesc: Whether you run a delivery company, a beauty salon, or a growing team — the workspace adapts to your activity.
landing.modernInterfaceDesc: A clean, intuitive workspace designed for daily use — not a cluttered dashboard.
landing.flexibleByDesignDesc: Activate only what you need. Your workspace adapts to your activity, not the other way around.
landing.reliableSecureDesc: Your data stays protected. Role-based access, encrypted sessions, and full control over your account.
landing.designedForGrowthDesc: Start small and scale up. Add people, features, and locations without starting over.
landing.readyToTakeControl: Ready to take control of your business?
landing.createInMinutes: Create your workspace in minutes. No credit card required.

trial_started.line3: Have questions? Contact our support team.
